company_type: Tools, Equipment, Diagnostics, and Repair Information

supply_chain.dependencies: Principal raw material is steel, including specialized alloys available only from a limited group of approved suppliers. Some electronic components are sourced from a finite set of suppliers. Specialized materials and components have been, and may be in the future, in short supply.
supply_chain.risks: Price and supply fluctuations related to raw materials (steel, plastics, electronics). Mill shutdowns or production cut backs. Supply chain disruptions or inefficiencies from weather events, armed conflicts, government actions, outbreaks of infectious diseases. Tariffs and other trade protection measures. Concentration risk with limited suppliers for specialized alloys and electronic components.

regulatory_risks: Environmental laws, ordinances, regulations, and requirements
Climate change regulations and standards (including CSRD in EU and SEC climate disclosure rules)
Anti-bribery and anti-corruption laws (including U.S. Foreign Corrupt Practices Act)
Changes in fuel economy requirements or vehicle emissions requirements
Privacy rights and use of AI regulations
Withholding and other taxes on remittances
Classification of third parties (including franchisees) as independent from the company

sanction_risks: Sanctions and actions taken against Russia and Belarus due to invasion of Ukraine
Expansion of conflict or changes in governmental/third party responses could adversely impact business
